title: RaceGuard report event (NDJSON line object)
description: Shape of RaceGuard::Event#to_h as written by JsonReporter, FileReporter, and WebhookReporter. One JSON object per line (newline-delimited JSON). Stability: required top-level keys are stable across minor releases; new optional top-level keys may appear in minor versions.

severity.description: Severity level; serialized as lowercase string.

timestamp.description: UTC ISO 8601 with millisecond precision (from Event#to_h).

context.description: JSON-serializable context; string keys in output. May include suggested_fix, protect, protect_stack, or detector-specific keys.
